creator: dave@daveg.ca
text:
uname -a I'll just insert here.  The build machine is 13.0.  The jails for building are 13.0 and 12.2p4.

FreeBSD vr.home.dclg.ca 13.0-RELEASE FreeBSD 13.0-RELEASE #21 releng/13.0-n244733-ea31abc261f-dirty: Tue Apr 20 12:19:38 EDT 2021     root@vr.home.dclg.ca:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC  amd64

I'll attach pkg version, but this is in poudriere, so it's the pkgs that are created by building, not the package versions on the host.
